{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Assurance Manager",
  "description": "Mopson Pharmaceutical Limited develops, produces, and markets drugs licensed for use as medications. MOPSON pharmaceutical limited are makers of both ethical and generic medications The Company&rsquo;s products are all registered with the National Agency for Food and Drugs Administration Control (NAFDAC) in compliance with the statutory regulation.

Mopson Pharmaceutical Limited has been in the business of manufacturing and supply of medicines since 1980. The company has been the preferred supplier of most of the pharmaceutical requirements of government institutions like the Government Hospitals, University Teaching Hospitals, industrial clinics, private hospitals and clinics in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Quality Assurance Manager, is in charge of supervising the production process to make sure that all products meet consistent standards.
	Their duties include developing and implementing quality control tests, inspecting products at various stages and writing reports documenting production issues.


Responsibilities
The Quality Manager has several duties and responsibilities. Some of these include:


	Implementing methods to inspect, test and evaluate products and production equipments
	Ensuring that products adhere to quality standards
	Preparing reports by collecting, analyzing and summarizing data
	Working according to deadlines for the delivery of products
	Training and managing production line staff in production practices and quality assessment of goods
	Tracking products through the manufacturing process to guarantee that each part of the process is correct
	Performing detailed and recorded inspections of final products so the products are up to industry and company standards
	Eliminating products that are not up to standards and finding the reasons for product problems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: prudencennenna@yahoo.com or&nbsp;&nbsp;priscaokerafor@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Quality Assurance Manager Job at Mopson Pharmaceutical Limited




        
    

        
        Mopson Pharmaceutical Limited develops, produces, and markets drugs licensed for use as medications. MOPSON pharmaceutical limited are makers of both ethical and generic medications The Company’s products are all registered with the National Agency for Food and Drugs Administration Control (NAFDAC) in compliance with the statutory regulation.

Mopson Pharmaceutical Limited has been in the business of manufacturing and supply of medicines since 1980. The company has been the preferred supplier of most of the pharmaceutical requirements of government institutions like the Government Hospitals, University Teaching Hospitals, industrial clinics, private hospitals and clinics in Nigeria.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Quality Assurance Manager, is in charge of supervising the production process to make sure that all products meet consistent standards.
	Their duties include developing and implementing quality control tests, inspecting products at various stages and writing reports documenting production issues.


Responsibilities
The Quality Manager has several duties and responsibilities. Some of these include:


	Implementing methods to inspect, test and evaluate products and production equipments
	Ensuring that products adhere to quality standards
	Preparing reports by collecting, analyzing and summarizing data
	Working according to deadlines for the delivery of products
	Training and managing production line staff in production practices and quality assessment of goods
	Tracking products through the manufacturing process to guarantee that each part of the process is correct
	Performing detailed and recorded inspections of final products so the products are up to industry and company standards
	Eliminating products that are not up to standards and finding the reasons for product problems.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or  [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Clinora Health Group is dedicated to providing high-quality healthcare that is ethical and accessible. Our focus on prevention, education, and effective treatment guarantees that our patients receive the best care possible.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Agege, Lagos

Job Summary


	We are looking for a motivated and customer-focused Sales Representative to identify potential customers, present products or services, close sales, and maintain strong client relationships.
	The ideal candidate should have excellent communication skills, negotiation abilities, and a passion for achieving sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and contact potential customers
	Present and explain products or services to clients
	Negotiate prices and close sales deals
	Maintain relationships with existing customers
	Meet or exceed sales targets and KPIs
	Prepare sales reports and customer records
	Respond to customer questions and complaints
	Conduct market research and monitor competitors
	Attend meetings, training sessions, and sales events


Requirements and Skills


	Minimum of OND
	Proven experience in sales or customer service is an advantage
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Good negotiation and persuasion abilities
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Basic computer knowledge and familiarity with CRM software
	Goal-oriented and self-motivated


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Applications to: clinorahg@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Sales Representative Job at Clinora Health Group




        
    

        
        Clinora Health Group is dedicated to providing high-quality healthcare that is ethical and accessible. Our focus on prevention, education, and effective treatment guarantees that our patients receive the best care possible.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Agege, Lagos

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a motivated and customer-focused Sales Representative to identify potential customers, present products or services, close sales, and maintain strong client relationships.
	The ideal candidate should have excellent communication skills, negotiation abilities, and a passion for achieving sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and contact potential customers
	Present and explain products or services to clients
	Negotiate prices and close sales deals
	Maintain relationships with existing customers
	Meet or exceed sales targets and KPIs
	Prepare sales reports and customer records
	Respond to customer questions and complaints
	Conduct market research and monitor competitors
	Attend meetings, training sessions, and sales events


Requirements and Skills


	Minimum of OND
	Proven experience in sales or customer service is an advantage
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Good negotiation and persuasion abilities
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Basic computer knowledge and familiarity with CRM software
	Goal-oriented and self-motivated


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Medical Sonographer",
  "description": "Fortics Lifecare Limited is a management company dedicated to enhancing healthcare delivery across Nigeria. With a focus on managing and expanding primary and secondary care assets, the company supports a network of cottage hospitals. Fortics Lifecare combines a robust clinical governance framework and cloud-based data systems to ensure the delivery of cost-effective and quality care. Driven by a mission to inspire hope and promote health, the organisation integrates clinical practice, education, and research to address healthcare needs effectively.&nbsp;

Fortics Lifecare is to be a leading healthcare holding company in Africa, developing existing healthcare assets into world-class health facilities across the continent integrating quality service delivery to clients and financial prosperity for our sake, to inspire and promote hope, health and total wellbeing by providing the best care for every patient through integrated clinical practice, continuos education and research, delivering this service at cost-effective prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sonographer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Eti-osa 3 - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday &ndash; Friday | 9:00 AM &ndash; 4:00 PM

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Sonographer to join our clinical team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for delivering high-quality diagnostic ultrasound services while ensuring patient safety, comfort, and accurate reporting.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform high-quality diagnostic ultrasound scans to assess and monitor medical conditions.
	Operate and maintain ultrasound equipment efficiently and safely.
	Analyze and interpret ultrasound images, identifying normal and abnormal findings.
	Provide clear, accurate reports to attending physicians.
	Ensure patient comfort, safety, and proper communication throughout procedures.
	Maintain accurate documentation of patient data and examination results.
	Adhere to quality assurance standards, protocols, and hospital policies.
	Collaborate with physicians, radiologists, and other healthcare professionals.
	Support equipment maintenance and promptly report any faults or issues.
	Stay updated with advancements in sonography and participate in continuous professional development.


Requirements


	Relevant qualification in Sonography or Medical Imaging.
	3-4 years of working experience.
	Sonography medical valid working licence.
	Proven experience in diagnostic ultrasound practice.
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.
	Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
	Ability to work effectively within a multidisciplinary team.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Resume to: staff-success@fortics.org using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Medical Sonographer Job at Fortics Lifecare Limited




        
    

        
        Fortics Lifecare Limited is a management company dedicated to enhancing healthcare delivery across Nigeria. With a focus on managing and expanding primary and secondary care assets, the company supports a network of cottage hospitals. Fortics Lifecare combines a robust clinical governance framework and cloud-based data systems to ensure the delivery of cost-effective and quality care. Driven by a mission to inspire hope and promote health, the organisation integrates clinical practice, education, and research to address healthcare needs effectively. 
     

            
    



Fortics Lifecare is to be a leading healthcare holding company in Africa, developing existing healthcare assets into world-class health facilities across the continent integrating quality service delivery to clients and financial prosperity for our sake, to inspire and promote hope, health and total wellbeing by providing the best care for every patient through integrated clinical practice, continuos education and research, delivering this service at cost-effective prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sonographer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Eti-osa 3 - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday – Friday | 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Sonographer to join our clinical team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for delivering high-quality diagnostic ultrasound services while ensuring patient safety, comfort, and accurate reporting.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform high-quality diagnostic ultrasound scans to assess and monitor medical conditions.
	Operate and maintain ultrasound equipment efficiently and safely.
	Analyze and interpret ultrasound images, identifying normal and abnormal findings.
	Provide clear, accurate reports to attending physicians.
	Ensure patient comfort, safety, and proper communication throughout procedures.
	Maintain accurate documentation of patient data and examination results.
	Adhere to quality assurance standards, protocols, and hospital policies.
	Collaborate with physicians, radiologists, and other healthcare professionals.
	Support equipment maintenance and promptly report any faults or issues.
	Stay updated with advancements in sonography and participate in continuous professional development.


Requirements


	Relevant qualification in Sonography or Medical Imaging.
	3-4 years of working experience.
	Sonography medical valid working licence.
	Proven experience in diagnostic ultrasound practice.
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.
	Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
	Ability to work effectively within a multidisciplinary team.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Territory Development Officer",
  "description": "DAG Industries Nigeria Limited - We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants and unfaltering after sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to provide genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to its customers and business associates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Territory Development Officer
Job Locations: Mushin, Ajeromi, Apapa, Kosofe, Surulere and Amuwo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Regional Sales Manager / National Sales Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and results-oriented Territory Development Officer to drive sales growth, expand market coverage, and strengthen customer relationships within an assigned territory.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, increasing product penetration, managing distributor and dealer relationships, and ensuring the achievement of sales targets


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement sales strategies to achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets within the assigned territory.
	Identify, develop, and acquire new customers, distributors, dealers, and retail outlets.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, key accounts, wholesalers, and retailers.
	Increase product availability, visibility, and market penetration across the assigned territory.
	Conduct regular customer visits to strengthen relationships and identify new sales opportunities.
	Execute sales promotions, product launches, merchandising activities, and marketing campaigns.
	Monitor competitor activities, pricing, customer trends, and market developments, providing timely feedback to management.
	Prepare accurate sales forecasts and develop action plans to achieve territory objectives.
	Ensure timely order generation, product delivery coordination, and customer satisfaction.
	Monitor inventory levels at distributor and retail locations to minimize stock-outs and maximize product availability.
	Ensure prompt collection of customer payments in line with company credit policies.
	Resolve customer complaints and coordinate with relevant departments to ensure effective service delivery.
	Maintain accurate customer records, sales reports, market intelligence reports, and territory performance data.
	Participate in trade exhibitions, dealer meetings, promotional events, and customer engagement activities.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, sales processes, and reporting requirements.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Sales, Economics, or a related field.
	Professional certification in Sales, Marketing, or Business Development is an added advantage.


Experience


	3&ndash;5 years of proven experience in field sales, territory management, or business development.
	Experience in FMCG, automobile, manufacturing, pharmaceuticals, consumer goods, financial services, telecommunications, or distribution is highly preferred.
	Demonstrated success in consistently achieving or exceeding sales targets.
	Experience managing distributors, dealers, wholesalers, and retail networks.


Required Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong sales and business development skills.
	Excellent negotiation and closing abilities.
	Territory planning and execution.
	Customer relationship management.
	Market analysis and competitor intelligence.
	Strong communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to identify and develop new business opportunities.
	Analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Experience using CRM systems and sales reporting tools.
	Ability to work independently and under minimal supervision.


Preferred Industry Experience
Candidates with experience in any of the following industries will have an added advantage:


	FMCG
	Automobile
	Manufacturing
	Pharmaceuticals
	Consumer Electronics
	Distribution
	FinTech
	Agricultural Products
	Telecommunications
	Financial Services


Personal Attributes:


	Self-driven and target-oriented.
	Strong commercial and business acumen.
	Excellent interpersonal and relationship management skills.
	High level of integrity and professionalism.
	Proactive with a strong sense of ownership.
	Resilient and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Kingsley.o@bajajnigeria.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Territory Development Officer Job at DAG Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        DAG Industries Nigeria Limited - We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants and unfaltering after sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to provide genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to its customers and business associates.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Territory Development Officer
Job Locations: Mushin, Ajeromi, Apapa, Kosofe, Surulere and Amuwo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Regional Sales Manager / National Sales Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and results-oriented Territory Development Officer to drive sales growth, expand market coverage, and strengthen customer relationships within an assigned territory.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, increasing product penetration, managing distributor and dealer relationships, and ensuring the achievement of sales targets


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement sales strategies to achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets within the assigned territory.
	Identify, develop, and acquire new customers, distributors, dealers, and retail outlets.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, key accounts, wholesalers, and retailers.
	Increase product availability, visibility, and market penetration across the assigned territory.
	Conduct regular customer visits to strengthen relationships and identify new sales opportunities.
	Execute sales promotions, product launches, merchandising activities, and marketing campaigns.
	Monitor competitor activities, pricing, customer trends, and market developments, providing timely feedback to management.
	Prepare accurate sales forecasts and develop action plans to achieve territory objectives.
	Ensure timely order generation, product delivery coordination, and customer satisfaction.
	Monitor inventory levels at distributor and retail locations to minimize stock-outs and maximize product availability.
	Ensure prompt collection of customer payments in line with company credit policies.
	Resolve customer complaints and coordinate with relevant departments to ensure effective service delivery.
	Maintain accurate customer records, sales reports, market intelligence reports, and territory performance data.
	Participate in trade exhibitions, dealer meetings, promotional events, and customer engagement activities.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, sales processes, and reporting requirements.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Sales, Economics, or a related field.
	Professional certification in Sales, Marketing, or Business Development is an added advantage.


Experience


	3–5 years of proven experience in field sales, territory management, or business development.
	Experience in FMCG, automobile, manufacturing, pharmaceuticals, consumer goods, financial services, telecommunications, or distribution is highly preferred.
	Demonstrated success in consistently achieving or exceeding sales targets.
	Experience managing distributors, dealers, wholesalers, and retail networks.


Required Skills & Competencies:


	Strong sales and business development skills.
	Excellent negotiation and closing abilities.
	Territory planning and execution.
	Customer relationship management.
	Market analysis and competitor intelligence.
	Strong communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to identify and develop new business opportunities.
	Analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Experience using CRM systems and sales reporting tools.
	Ability to work independently and under minimal supervision.


Preferred Industry Experience
Candidates with experience in any of the following industries will have an added advantage:


	FMCG
	Automobile
	Manufacturing
	Pharmaceuticals
	Consumer Electronics
	Distribution
	FinTech
	Agricultural Products
	Telecommunications
	Financial Services


Personal Attributes:


	Self-driven and target-oriented.
	Strong commercial and business acumen.
	Excellent interpersonal and relationship management skills.
	High level of integrity and professionalism.
	Proactive with a strong sense of ownership.
	Resilient and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Solar Grid Site Manager Job at MykroGrid




        
    

        
        MykroGrid is a clean energy company committed to expanding access to reliable, affordable, and sustainable power solutions across underserved communities and businesses. We specialize in the design, installation, and maintenance of solar energy systems, helping homes, commercial establishments, and institutions reduce energy costs while improving energy reliability.

Our team is driven by innovation, technical excellence, and a passion for accelerating the transition to renewable energy. At MykroGrid, employees have the opportunity to work on impactful projects, develop their technical skills, and contribute to building a more sustainable future for Africa.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Solar Grid Site Manager

Job Location: Irrua-Ekpoma, Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	We are looking for an experienced electrical engineer to join our clean energy company in the role of Solar Grid Site Manager.
	The Site Manager will be responsible for operating and maintaining a 200 – 1,000kWp solar grid. Candidates should be knowledgeable about solar technology, inverters, and batteries.
	The Site Manager will need to relocate to the site of the solar grid.


Responsibilities
System Monitoring and Operations:


	Proactively manage generation and storage assets to ensure reliable operation
	Monitor system KPIs and make plans to correct any shortfalls
	Report to management on system operations
	Repair damaged distribution lines when needed


Communication:


	Communicate professionally with clients and maintain the good reputation of the company
	Respond promptly to client questions or concerns
	Communicate quickly and effectively with MykroGrid management to address any concerns and to report on the status of the assets


Documentation:


	Maintain accurate records of any faults that arise and report promptly on issues requiring corrective action


Qualifications


	At least 5 years of experience with electrical power distribution systems, preferably over 500kW.
	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (preferably in Electrical, Mechanical, or Renewable Energy Engineering)
	Strong knowledge of power generation and distribution systems, ideally with some experience in solar systems
	Excellent electrical troubleshooting skills
	Effective communication and interpersonal abilities
	Permanent assignment at grid location required
	Candidates should also have experience monitoring and managing power systems, whether it be solar, gas, or another energy class.


Salary
N300,000 – N500,000 per month.
